name: @pureliture/ai-cli-orch-wrapper
description: Installable aco CLI package for command pack setup, provider setup, execution, and session lifecycle.

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.resolve(process.cwd(), '../../templates'); const dest = path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'templates'); fs.rmSync(dest, { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); fs.cpSync(src, dest, { recursive: true });"
scripts.test: node --require tsx/cjs --test tests/providers.test.ts tests/session.test.ts tests/runtime-context.test.ts tests/runtime-dashboard.test.ts tests/sentinel.test.ts tests/sync.test.ts tests/sync-conflict.test.ts
